description: Sitemap settings for a Total CMS collection. Used as a card sub-schema on the collection meta.
formgrid:
enabled .
priority priority
frequency date
exclude include

id.label: ID
id.help: Reserved — required by the schema system but unused for cards.

enabled.label: Include in Sitemap
enabled.help: Generate a sitemap for this collection and list it in the sitemap index. When disabled, /sitemap/{collection} returns 404.

date.label: Date Property
date.help: Object property used for the lastmod timestamp. Choose any property from the collection's schema.

frequency.label: Change Frequency
frequency.help: Hint to crawlers about how often objects change. Most search engines treat this as advisory.

priority.label: Priority
priority.help: Default crawl priority for objects in this collection (0.0 to 1.0). Leave at 0 to omit.

include.label: Include Filter
include.help: Only include objects matching this filter expression. Example: published:true

exclude.label: Exclude Filter
exclude.help: Skip objects matching this filter expression. Example: draft:true
